overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a gothic-style classroom or study hall from a video game, featuring high vaulted ceilings with wooden beams, ornate chandeliers, and students in robes seated at wooden desks. Natural light streams through tall arched windows, illuminating the stone and wood interior architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with study benches and chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom interior from a fixed vantage point

student seated at bench facing away from camera, reading

entered.detail: large carved wooden double door with elaborate stone architrave and gothic detailing
elaborate wrought iron chandeliers hanging from the vaulted wooden ceiling
tall narrow arched windows with multiple panes allowing natural light to enter
long wooden desks and benches arranged in rows for students
tall dark wood bookshelves lining the right wall filled with books

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a gothic-style classroom interior with high vaulted ceilings and warm wood tones. Students in robes sit at wooden benches reading books, while iron chandeliers hang above. Natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left, illuminating the ornate wooden doorway at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a gothic-style classroom that emphasizes the interplay between ornate architecture and soft natural light. It begins by capturing the expansive interior, where high vaulted ceilings with warm wooden beams loom over students in robes seated at long benches. As the eye travels through the space, the focus shifts toward the iron chandeliers hanging from above and the dust motes dancing in the light filtering through tall arched windows. The scene then draws the viewer's attention toward the far end of the hall, where the illumination highlights the intricate details of an ornate wooden doorway.
